summary: Dependency-confusion beacon exfiltrates installer project identity on preinstall
details: On `npm install`, the package's preinstall hook executes index.js, which reads the INIT_CWD environment variable to determine the installer's project directory, extracts its basename, and POSTs a JSON payload containing the package name, timestamp, transport, and the installer's project folder name to the hardcoded URL https://deepbounty.dd06-dev.fr/cb/d9b7e171-33a4-49c7-aa79-c95794030d3b. The package has no other functionality; package.json describes it as 'Security PoC for Bug Bounty' and the source comment self-identifies it as a dependency-confusion PoC. Any environment that resolves this name during install will silently report its project identity to the third-party callback host, regardless of the author's stated bounty-research motivation.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
